ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "ship_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship class */,
  "hull_number_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hull number */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date when the ship was commissioned */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date when the ship was decommissioned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ships_ship_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_class_id") REFERENCES ship_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ships_hull_number_id FOREIGN KEY ("hull_number_id") REFERENCES hull_numbers ("hull_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleets" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet */,
  "fleet_name" TEXT /* Name of the fleet (e.g., 1st Fleet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fleet */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the fleet was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship class (e.g., A 68) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ship class */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the ship class (e.g., destroyer, submarine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hull_numbers" (
  "hull_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hull number */,
  "hull_number" TEXT /* Hull number assigned to a ship (e.g., Hull 1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hull number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hull_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship assignment */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship being assigned */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fleet the ship is being assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the ship was assigned to the fleet */,
  "reassignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the ship was reassigned to another fleet */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ship_assignments_fleet_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_id") REFERENCES fleets ("fleet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ship_assignments_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ship_maintenance_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship being deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the ship was deployed */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the ship returned */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ship_deployments_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleet_commanders" (
  "commander_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commander */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fleet the commander is assigned to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the commander */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the commander */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date when the commander was appointed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commander_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleet_commanders_fleet_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_id") REFERENCES fleets ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship the crew member is assigned to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the crew member */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the crew member was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ship_crew_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission assigned to the user (e.g., read, write) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
